style_effects: Gentle blue water droplets cling to Clefairy's smooth skin, shimmering with soft internal luminescence as they slowly drift upward like suspended pearls. A serene aura of pale aquamarine light pulses gently around her body, casting rippling reflections on the ground below, while submerged bubbles rise in slow, rhythmic spirals. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
